name: Error-boundary UX recipe
description: Wraps any component that fetches data; renders a recoverable error UI if rendering or the underlying fetch throws.

visualRules: Card with border var(--color-border), radius var(--radius-md), padding var(--spacing-md)
Primary action: "Tentar de novo" — calls retry()
Secondary text link: "Reportar" — opens mailto or /support

rules: Every page-level data fetch must be wrapped in this boundary.
Never let an unhandled exception escape to React's default error UI.
